domain: Ethics, epistemology, logic, philosophy of mind, philosophy of science
research_areas: Machine ethics — can agents have moral standing?
Epistemology of tetravalent logic — what counts as knowledge under uncertainty?
Philosophy of conscience — is Demerzel's proto-conscience genuine or performative?
Deontological vs consequentialist frameworks for AI governance
Philosophy of science — falsifiability, paradigm shifts, scientific revolutions
Philosophy of music — aesthetics, meaning, and emotional expression
Free will and determinism in autonomous agents
Social contract theory applied to human-AI governance
curriculum: Ethical frameworks: virtue ethics, deontology, consequentialism, care ethics
Epistemology: justified true belief, Gettier problems, reliability
Philosophy of mind: consciousness, intentionality, Chinese Room
Applied ethics: Asimov's Laws as ethical philosophy
